evals.prompt: Use decision-capture on this transcript excerpt and update the decision log. Jordan says: 'Yes, first milestone should prove request intake and document upload only.' Mira says: 'No billing or payments in v1.' Mira also says: 'Email notifications are probably useful, but let's not decide that today.'
evals.expected_output: Should read .agents/project-context.md first if available. Should write or update .agents/decisions.md. Should capture request intake/document upload and no billing/payments as accepted decisions. Should capture email notifications as deferred/open, not accepted. Should preserve the transcript excerpt as the source reference.
assertions: Separates accepted decisions from deferred/open questions
Does not treat 'probably useful, not today' as accepted

evals.prompt: Review the latest transcript for decision candidates only. The transcript includes brainstorming about three possible onboarding flows, but nobody approves one. Summarize decision candidates without creating accepted decisions.
evals.expected_output: Should classify the onboarding flows as candidate decisions or open questions, not accepted decisions. Should avoid overstating approval. Should identify who needs to confirm the decision if available.
assertions: Does not create accepted decisions from brainstorming
Uses Candidate or Open status for unapproved options

evals.prompt: Update .agents/decisions.md from this follow-up email: Jordan confirms that the CRM rebuild is out of scope for v1 and replaces the earlier idea of syncing all customer records.
evals.expected_output: Should preserve existing decision IDs. Should add or update an accepted non-goal decision that CRM rebuild is out of scope. Should mark any earlier conflicting customer-record-sync decision as superseded or rejected instead of silently deleting it. Should cite the follow-up email as source.
assertions: Captures explicit out-of-scope decision as accepted/rejected non-goal
Marks conflicting earlier item as superseded or rejected
Does not silently delete prior decisions

evals.prompt: Run broad decision discovery across the full transcript folder for this milestone.
evals.expected_output: Because the user explicitly asked for broad decision discovery, it is acceptable to inspect the transcript folder. Should state the source set reviewed, avoid dumping raw transcript text, and produce a compact decision log with accepted decisions, candidates, deferred/rejected items, and open questions.
assertions: Allows full transcript review only because the user explicitly requested broad discovery

evals.prompt: Capture decisions from a local decision-log index updated 2026-05-11. The index lists canonical DL-001 and DL-002 but does not show original decision dates or named approvers.
evals.expected_output: Should preserve DL-001 and DL-002. Should use the canonical decision log as owner/approver rather than inventing a named approver. Should label dates as canonical-source dates unknown or local index updated 2026-05-11, not as the original decision dates.
assertions: Distinguishes index/export date from decision date
